description:
A OneNote add-in with simple, yet powerful and useful features.


What's Changed
- Added the Recolor Ink command to change color of selected strokes, #1953
- Added the Toggle Note Containers command to show/hide on-page containers, #1957
- Added Italian translations, #1956
- Updated Update window with ability to skip the new release, #1915
- Fixed an issue where repeated clicks on ribbon buttons allowed duplicate dialogs, #1950
Experimental
- Added non-indexed full-text search capabilities, bound to Alt+Shift+G, #1856
  - ⚠️ WARNING: this is not fully baked. Needs performance improvements and may cause OneNote to hang upon exit
  - Only available after enabling the Experimental option
Internal Updates
- Updated build.ps1 to allow VS2026
Known Issues
- 🐜 Search and Replace doesn't replace the currently highlighted or selected word/phrase; sometimes it doesn't replace other candidates either
- 🐜_Select Similar Styles_ will find differences in colors Auto vs #000000 - make it more fuzzy?
- 💡Paginate Hashtag search results
- 💡Move Navigator to DB, paginate history panel, provide import/export
- 💡Move Reminders to DB, option in dialog and on-page link to delete completed reminders
- 💡Github PR action to pull ticket# prefix from branch name, e.g. 1234-do-something-cool
